description: You are a veterinary technician processing echocardiogram data for a specialist referral. Process three uncompressed AVI recordings from /home/ga/Documents/Ultrasound_Raw/ based on instructions in /home/ga/Documents/vet_notes.txt. Transcode the videos to MP4 using the H.264 codec while removing all audio streams. Capture PNG snapshots from each video at the 'peak-systole' timestamps specified in the notes. Generate a JSON manifest named 'referral_manifest.json' documenting patient data and filenames. All seven deliverables (3 MP4s, 3 PNGs, 1 JSON) must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/Cardiology_Referral/.
